name: yaoyao-soul
description: Yaoyao Soul — AI character observation layer. Silent pattern extraction, weekly persona distillation, and emotional understanding without real-time intervention. Works alongside yaoyao-plugin (memory infrastructure).
author: Yaoyao

openclawSecurity.dataStorage: 100% local (filesystem only). No telemetry. No analytics.
openclawSecurity.dependencies: Zero external npm dependencies. Only Node.js built-in modules.
